heading: Under Secretary of Commerce for Standards and Technology
label: 273a Under Secretary of Commerce for Standards and Technology
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 4 of , , which was not classified to the Code, was repealed.act Mar. 3, 1901, ch. 87231 Stat. 1449
amendments: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 4 of , , which was not classified to the Code, was repealed.act Mar. 3, 1901, ch. 87231 Stat. 1449

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There shall be in the Department of Commerce an Under Secretary of Commerce for Standards and Technology (in this section referred to as the “Under Secretary”).

children.heading: Appointment
children.label: b Appointment
children.text: The Under Secretary shall be appointed by the President by and with the advice and consent of the Senate.

children.heading: Compensation
children.label: c Compensation
children.text: The Under Secretary shall be compensated at the rate in effect for level III of the Executive Schedule under .section 5314 of title 5

children.heading: Duties
children.label: d Duties
children.text: The Under Secretary shall serve as the Director of the Institute and shall perform such duties as required of the Director by the Secretary under this chapter or by law.

children.heading: Applicability
children.label: e Applicability
children.text: The individual serving as the Director of the Institute on , shall also serve as the Under Secretary until such time as a successor is appointed under subsection (b).January 4, 2011
